productDisplayName: Wrangler Women's Rhythm Graphic Coral Red T-shirt
description: CompositionCoral red V-neck t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, with chest print running onto the neck hemline and inner back panel, cap sleeves with flat gathers below and mild puffs near the shoulders with a sleeve flap and brand name printed on the back neck FittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Designed to appreciate the ever popular outdoor musical fests of Canada, The Jazz N Blues Festival, this coral red top from wrangler speaks it all with its fun-filled chest print. The stylishly gathered cap flaps make it a comfortable wear accentuating your well toned arms, while the back neck branding creates a niche style statement.  Team this with jeans or white pants and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
